flags.concern: Step 4 applies the shared render-time transform inside `OverlayEditor.getClipBounds()`, but in this repository `getClipBounds()` is not a display-only helper. It seeds `fullBounds`, crop calculations, resize state, and the values later passed back through `onOverlayChange()`. If you feed intersected/render-adjusted bounds into that function, the editor will start editing synthetic render bounds instead of the real clip bounds.
flags.evidence: `getClipBounds()` is used to build `fullBounds` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/OverlayEditor.tsx:152-186,218-231`; crop math consumes `startFullBounds` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/OverlayEditor.tsx:334-374`; and edits are written back via `onOverlayChange()` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PreviewPanel/OverlayEditor.tsx:417-429`.
